name: council
description: Convene a five-agent council on hard questions via the /council command: a captain decomposes the task and orchestrates a Teams-API team where researcher and synthesizer run in parallel and cross-pollinate live via SendMessage, a clarity agent reads their output and asks real follow-ups, and a janitor flags bloat before delivery. Use when a question needs both cited evidence and rigorous reasoning, gap-checking before the answer ships, or reactive multi-agent collaboration instead of one-shot fire-and-forget subagents.
